response.overview: Eight-year-old Sami can't wait to play “serial killers” with her older sister Jiya, but her sister-time is threatened when Jiya's cool new bestie arrives.  ‘Clown’ is a coming-of-age drama laced with comedy. At its heart, it is a story about our first interaction with loneliness. Should we choose the embrace of others at the expense of rejecting ourselves?
response.title: Clown
